phrases.cultural_note: Public toilets are available in the gardens; signs may say sanitaires.

responses.english: Restrooms are near the basin, toward the Rue de l'Odéon side.
responses.phonetic: lay twa-LET son pray duh bah-SAN, koh-TAY roo duh loh-day-ON
responses.french: Les toilettes sont près du bassin, côté rue de l'Odéon.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where toy sailboats are rented
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on louer les petits bateaux ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-ton loo-AY lay puh-TEE bah-TOH
phrases.cultural_note: Model sailboats are a classic garden activity near the central basin.

responses.english: You can rent boats near the big basin, near the palace.
responses.phonetic: voo poo-VAY loo-AY lay bah-TOH pray duh grahn bah-SAN, pray duh pah-LAY
responses.french: Vous pouvez louer les bateaux près du grand bassin, près du palais.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if chairs can be moved
phrases.cultural_note: Loose green chairs are often movable unless a section is restricted.

responses.english: Yes, you can move the chairs except in private areas.
responses.phonetic: wee, voo poo-VAY day-plah-SAY lay shez sof dahn lay zon pray-VAY
responses.french: Oui, vous pouvez déplacer les chaises sauf dans les zones privées.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the dog area is
phrases.text_local: La zone pour les chiens est de quel côté ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah zohn poor lay shyan eh duh kel koh-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: Dog access is limited to designated areas; ask before entering lawns.

responses.english: The dog area is toward Rue Méchain, in the southeast.
responses.phonetic: lah zohn poor shyan eh duh koh-TAY duh lah roo may-KAN, oh syd-es
responses.french: La zone pour chiens est du côté de la rue Méchain, au sud-est.

phrases.text_local: Le jardin ferme à quelle heure aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: leh zhar-DAN fairm ah kel UR oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: Closing times vary seasonally; sunset periods often close earlier in winter.

responses.english: The gardens close at 5:30 PM today. In winter, it's at 4:30 PM.
responses.phonetic: leh zhar-DAN fairm ah say-tahn-oor oo-zhoor-DWEE. on nee-VAIR, say ah seez-oor tront
responses.french: Le jardin ferme à 17h30 aujourd'hui. En hiver, c'est à 16h30.
